name: Email Abuse Intelligence — Evidence & Confidence Model
description: The substantiation layer of the reference model: five classes of observable evidence and four tiers of confidence, each with a stable identifier and a precise rule. No classification is asserted without an observable.
model: Email Abuse Intelligence Reference Model v1.0.0

evidenceClasses.name: Network
evidenceClasses.captures: Sending IP, ASN, reverse DNS, netblock and geolocation, HELO/EHLO identity.
evidenceClasses.directlyObserved: From the receiving MTA and message headers — not from DNS alone.

evidenceClasses.name: Authentication
evidenceClasses.captures: SPF result, DKIM result and selector, DMARC policy and alignment, ARC chain.
evidenceClasses.directlyObserved: The one class SpamCrackers reads directly: SPF, DMARC and MX exactly, and DKIM heuristically, over public DNS. A pass/fail result and ARC require the received message.

evidenceClasses.name: Content
evidenceClasses.captures: URL and domain patterns, file and body hashes, template and layout fingerprints, header anomalies.
evidenceClasses.directlyObserved: From the message body and its attachments.

evidenceClasses.name: Behavioural
evidenceClasses.captures: Volume and velocity, send timing, list-bombing bursts, engagement tracking.
evidenceClasses.directlyObserved: From aggregate mail-flow telemetry over time.

evidenceClasses.name: Infrastructure
evidenceClasses.captures: Domain age and registrar, nameservers, hosting, redirect chains, certificate history.
evidenceClasses.directlyObserved: From DNS, WHOIS and certificate-transparency enrichment.

confidenceTiers.name: Low
confidenceTiers.rule: A single weak or ambiguous indicator from one evidence class.
confidenceTiers.use: Suitable for enrichment and triage — not for enforcement.

confidenceTiers.name: Moderate
confidenceTiers.rule: Multiple independent indicators from two or more different evidence classes point to the same classification.
confidenceTiers.use: Supports prioritisation and soft action such as flagging.

confidenceTiers.name: High
confidenceTiers.rule: Corroborated indicators across classes, including at least one strong class — Authentication or Infrastructure.

confidenceTiers.name: Confirmed
confidenceTiers.rule: Direct, reproducible evidence — a detonated payload, an observed campaign artefact, or a reproduced authentication failure.
confidenceTiers.use: Definitive; supports attribution-grade conclusions and blocking.
